This package provides a recovery behavior for the navigation stack which
        steps back and proceed with a specified steer angle
readme: #stepback_and_steerturn_recovery ざっくりしたものはissue参照→Recovery 移動中リアルタイムにcostmapを参照し，衝突前に停止する．許容距離はパラメータで設定可能． hogehoge_length obstacle_patience Topic Publish /recover_run Type: std_msgs::Bool リカバリ開始時にtrue, リカバリ終了時にfalseをpublish． 動画サンプル→https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j6GID9XuiiU まずはcatkin_makeする． navigation planner.yaml(NavfanROSやTrajectoryPlannerROSの設定が入っているファイル)に，以下のパラメータを追加する． recovery_behaviour_enabled: true recovery_behaviors: conservative_reset, type: clear_costmap_recovery/ClearCostmapRecovery} stepback_and_steerturn_recovery, type: stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/StepBackAndSteerTurnRecovery} aggressive_reset, type: clear_costmap_recovery/ClearCostmapRecovery} stepback_and_steerturn_recovery: 最初の一回だけ旋回したい場合にtrue only_single_steering: true trial_times obstacle_patience 移動中に，障害物を確認する頻度[回/sec] obstacle_check_frequency: 障害物探索時の角度の分解能[rad] costmapアクセス数を低減したいときに調整する． sim_angle_resolution: 障害物探索時のsim更新周期[回/sec] costmapアクセス回数を低減したいときに調整する． simulation_frequency back(初回後退時の速度[m/s], タイムアウト[sec]) linear_vel_back step_back_length step_back_timeout steer(旋回時の速度[rad/s]と目標回転角度[rad], タイムアウト[sec]) linear_vel_steer angular_speed_steer turn_angle steering_timeout forward(旋回→直進→旋回の直進時の速度[m/s]と目標移動距離[m], タイムアウト[sec]) linear_vel_forward step_forward_length step_forward_timeout: move_base立ち上げ時に以下のメッセージが出ていれば初期化成功 INFO] Initialized only_single_steering false INFO] Initialized recovery_trial_times INFO] Initialized obstacle_patience INFO] Initialized obstacle_check_frequency INFO] Initialized simulation_frequency INFO] Initialized sim_angle_resolution INFO] Initialized linear_vel_back step_back_length step_back_steering INFO] Initialized linear_vel_steer angular_speed_steer turn_angle steering_timeout INFO] Initialized linear_vel_forward step_forward_length step_forward_timeout rosparam list grep stepback_and_steerturn_recovery /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/angular_speed_steer /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/linear_vel_back /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/linear_vel_forward /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/linear_vel_steer /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/obstacle_check_frequency /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/obstacle_patience /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/only_single_steering /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/sim_angle_resolution /move_base/stepback_and_steerturn_recovery/simulation_frequency description:
The rqt_stream_manipulator_3d provides a GUI to the stream_manipulator_3d
      package, in order to dynamically reconfigure it.

Stream Manipulator 3D let's you subscribe to a stream of point

      online, republishing the modified streams. Input stream can be
      modified by applying various filters, in the order you choose.

This package suite provides abstract RPC (Remote Procedure Call)
  structure for higher level of robot operations for the ROS-based robots.

This package provides abstract RPC (Remote Procedure Call) structure for
  higher level of robot operations for the ROS-based robots.
  
  Some ROS-based robots come with higher level of convenient operation
  interface (e.g. often written in Python) where robot operators can call
  complicated tasks by a single command. "RPC" here enables interacting with
  those commands via ROS Topic/Service/Action from remote nodes.
readme: tork_rpc_util RPC (Remote Procedure Call) ROS package Introduction package abstract RPC (Remote Procedure Call) structure higher level robot operations ROS-based robots. ROS-based robots higher level convenient operation interface written Python) robot operators call complicated tasks single command. "RPC" enables interacting commands ROS Topic/Service/Action remote nodes. applications package [baxter_app_rpc](http://www.ros.org/news/2012/09/rethink-ros.html) Baxter. [hironx_rpc](http://wiki.ros.org/hironx_rpc) Hironx dual-arm co-robot. [Toyota HSR](http://www.toyota-global.com/innovation/partner_robot/family_2.html) (package publicly Install Install binary (recommended) sudo apt-get install ros-indigo-tork-rpc (Optional) Source install sudo apt-get install python-catkin-tools python-rosdep python-wstool mkdir %YOUR_CATKIN_WS%/src %YOUR_CATKIN_WS%/src git clone https://github.com/tork-a/tork_rpc.git %YOUR_CATKIN_WS% rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src catkin build source devel/setup.bash Run RPC package libraries/modules, executable. Tech support contribution appreciated! [Report issues](https://github.com/tork-a/tork_rpc/issues) Enhancement suggestion Github pull request](https://github.com/tork-a/tork_rpc/pulls). EoF

readme: Package tum_ardrone package implementation publications: Scale-Aware Navigation Low-Cost Quadrocopter Monocular Camera Engel, Sturm, Cremers) Camera-Based Navigation Low-Cost Quadrocopter Engel, Sturm, Cremers) Accurate Figure Flying Quadrocopter Onboard Visual Inertial Sensing Engel, Sturm, Cremers) find video youtube. Package builds monocular SLAM framework PTAM presented Klein Murray paper ISMAR07. study original PTAM website paper information part software. aware license code works AR.Drone default-parameters optimized AR.Drone Installation catkin catkin_ws/src git clone https://github.com/tum-vision/tum_ardrone.git hydro-devel rosdep install tum_ardrone catkin_make Quick start Launch nodes roslaunch tum_ardrone ardrone_driver.launch roslaunch tum_ardrone tum_ardrone.launch Check status GUI, Drone Communication Status, Drone Navdata: XHz Pose Estimates: Keyboard control focus drone_gui window press ESC activate control fly drone_gui key assignments) Joystick control rosrun joy joy_node press button controller activate fly drone_gui key assignments) Autopilot type command “autoInit top-left text-field click Clear Send click Reset drone takeoff init PTAM, hold position. click video interactively set target (relative current position); drone_stateestimation fly facilitate good scale estimate, dont start flying horizontally uneven terrain finger ESC joystick emergency-keyboard control Nodes drone_stateestimation Estimates drone’s position based navdata, control commands PTAM. IMPORTANT: requires messages /ardrone/navdata /ardrone/image_raw connected drone running ardrone_autonomy node, .bag replay channels. ardrone_autonomy started rosrun ardrone_autonomy ardrone_driver _navdata_demo:=0 _loop_rate:=500 #### Subscribed topics /ardrone/navdata /ardrone/image_raw /cmd_vel /tum_ardrone/com Published topics /ardrone/predictedPose /tum_ardrone/com Services #### Parameters ~publishFreq: frequency, drone’s estimated position calculated published. Default: ~calibFile: camera calibration file. set, defaults (camcalib/ardroneX_default.txt). UseControlGains: control gains EKF prediction. UsePTAM: PTAM pose estimates EKF update UseNavdata: Navdata information EKF update UsePTAM UseNavdata set false, EKF updated acts pure simulator, prediciting pose based control commands received /cmd_vel). Nice experimenting. PTAMMapLock: lock PTAM map PTAMSyncLock: lock PTAM map sync (fix scale pose offsets PTAMMaxKF: maximum amount PTAM takes. PTAMMinKFDist: min. distance meters) PTAMMinKFWiggleDist: min. distance (relative scene depth). PTAMMinKFTimeDiff: min time PTAM takes (PTAMMinKFTimeDiff (PTAMMinKFDist PTAMMinKFWiggleDist)), tracking good RescaleFixOrigin: scale Map reestimated, point mapping PTAM World remains fixed. RescaleFixOrigin false, current pos. drone avoid sudden, large “jumps”). map “drift”. RescaleFixOrigin true, default initialization point (drone pos. jump suddenly, map remains fixed.). fixpoint set command “lockScaleFP”. prediction model parameters EKF. “Camera-Based Navigation Low-Cost Quadrocopter” #### Required transforms TODO transforms TODO properly estimate PTAM’s scale, fly bit immediately initialization. windows, shows video PTAM’s map points, map. issue key commands, focus respective window hit key. generates command /tum_ardrone/com, turn parsed Video Window Key /tum_adrone/com message Action reset” resets PTAM toggleUI” view space space” takes Keyframe PTAM’s initialization keyframe” forces PTAM keyframe “toggleLog” starts stops extensive logging kinds values file toggleLockMap” locks map, equivalent parameter PTAMMapLock toggleLockSync” locks sync, equivalent parameter PTAMSyncLock Clicking video window generate waypoints, drone_autopilot running): left-click: fly (x,y,0)m relative current position. image-center borders right-click: fly rotate yaw degree. image-center borders degree Map Window Key /tum_adrone/com message Action reset” resets EKF PTAM toggleUI” view resetView” resets viewpoint viewer “toggleLog” starts stops extensive logging kinds values file clearTrail” clears green drone-trail drone_autopilot PID controller drone. includes basic way-point-following automatic initialization. Requires drone_stateestimation running. target set /tum_ardrone/com topic. #### Subscribed topics /ardrone/predictedPose Published topics /cmd_vel /ardrone/land /ardrone/takeoff /ardrone/reset Services #### Parameters ~minPublishFreq: control command pose estimate received drone_stateestimation. pose estimate received minPublishFreq milliseconds, HOVER command causing drone hover drone_stateestimation shut suddenly. Default: Ki_X, Kd_X, Kp_X: PID controller parameters roll/pitch, gaz (up/down) yaw. max_X: maximal respective control command rise_fac: rise commands larger respective drop commands factor. due drone dropping unpredictably fast large drop commands, rising somethimes requires large rise commands. aggressiveness: multiplied PI-component commands values lead drone flying “slower”. #### Required transforms TODO transforms TODO behavior autopilot set sending commands /tum_ardrone/com form COMMAND”. Queue commands command finished point reached), command popped. queue cleared sending clearCommands”. Commands drone_gui node. scripts /flightPlans/*.txt. commands autoInit [int moveTimeMS] [int waitTimeMS] [int riseTimeMs] [float initSpeed] takes control, starts drone, initializes PTAM. starts drone IMPORTANT: requires messages /ardrone/navdata /ardrone/image_raw connected drone running ardrone_autonomy node, .bag replay channels. ardrone_autonomy started rosrun ardrone_autonomy ardrone_driver _navdata_demo:=0 _loop_rate:=500 #### Subscribed topics /ardrone/navdata /ardrone/image_raw /cmd_vel /uga_tum_ardrone/com Published topics /ardrone/predictedPose /uga_tum_ardrone/com Services #### Parameters ~publishFreq: frequency, drone’s estimated position calculated published. Default: ~calibFile: camera calibration file. set, defaults (camcalib/ardroneX_default.txt). UseControlGains: control gains EKF prediction. UsePTAM: PTAM pose estimates EKF update UseNavdata: Navdata information EKF update UsePTAM UseNavdata set false, EKF updated acts pure simulator, prediciting pose based control commands received /cmd_vel). Nice experimenting. PTAMMapLock: lock PTAM map PTAMSyncLock: lock PTAM map sync (fix scale pose offsets PTAMMaxKF: maximum amount PTAM takes. PTAMMinKFDist: min. distance meters) PTAMMinKFWiggleDist: min. distance (relative scene depth). PTAMMinKFTimeDiff: min time PTAM takes (PTAMMinKFTimeDiff (PTAMMinKFDist PTAMMinKFWiggleDist)), tracking good RescaleFixOrigin: scale Map reestimated, point mapping PTAM World remains fixed. RescaleFixOrigin false, current pos. drone avoid sudden, large “jumps”). map “drift”. RescaleFixOrigin true, default initialization point (drone pos. jump suddenly, map remains fixed.). fixpoint set command “lockScaleFP”. MinTolerance: min. scale accept, prevents initialization failures drone crash (physically) MaxTolerance: max. scale accept, prevents initialization failures drone crash (physically) prediction model parameters EKF. “Camera-Based Navigation Low-Cost Quadrocopter” zDriftThreshold: ignore threshold landed, prevents drifting ground tracking lost yawDriftThreshold: ingore Yaw threshold landed, prevents drifting ground tracking lost #### Required transforms TODO transforms TODO properly estimate PTAM’s scale, fly bit immediately initialization. windows, shows video PTAM’s map points, map. issue key commands, focus respective window hit key. generates command /uga_tum_ardrone/com, turn parsed Video Window Key /tum_adrone/com message Action reset” resets PTAM toggleUI” view space space” takes Keyframe PTAM’s initialization keyframe” forces PTAM keyframe “toggleLog” starts stops extensive logging kinds values file toggleLockMap” locks map, equivalent parameter PTAMMapLock toggleLockSync” locks sync, equivalent parameter PTAMSyncLock Clicking video window generate waypoints, drone_autopilot running): left-click: fly (x,y,0)m relative current position. image-center borders right-click: fly rotate yaw degree. image-center borders degree Map Window Key /tum_adrone/com message Action reset” resets EKF PTAM toggleUI” view resetView” resets viewpoint viewer “toggleLog” starts stops extensive logging kinds values file clearTrail” clears green drone-trail drone_autopilot Critically damped spring based controller drone Wikipedia: Damping includes basic way-point-following automatic initialization. Requires drone_stateestimation running. target set /uga_tum_ardrone/com topic. dimensions (Yaw controlled drone’s motors. controlled drone “leaning” direction, complicates control slightly. damped springs provide target force drone generate motors leaning, maintaining altitude. #### Subscribed topics /ardrone/predictedPose Published topics /cmd_vel /ardrone/land /ardrone/takeoff /ardrone/reset Services #### Parameters ~minPublishFreq: control command pose estimate received drone_stateestimation. pose estimate received minPublishFreq milliseconds, HOVER command causing drone hover drone_stateestimation shut suddenly. Default: K_direct, K_rp: spring strength controlled dimensions (yaw leaning dimensions droneMassInKilos: needed proper damping max_yaw: limit speed yaw’ing drone spin fast!) xy_damping_factor: due leaning drone roughly approximate damped spring, tune parameter account air resistance wind max_rp_radians: match parameter ardrone_autonomy max_gaz_rise: limit maximum positive speed max_gaz_drop: limit maximum negative speed max_rp: limit maximum leaning command rise_fac: rise commands larger respective drop commands factor. due drone dropping unpredictably fast large drop commands, rising somethimes requires large rise commands. aggressiveness: multiplied PI-component commands values lead drone flying “slower”. #### Required transforms TODO transforms TODO behavior autopilot set sending commands /uga_tum_ardrone/com form COMMAND”. Queue commands command finished point reached), command popped. queue cleared sending clearCommands”. Commands drone_gui node. scripts /flightPlans/*.txt. commands autoInit [int moveTimeMS] [int waitTimeMS] [int riseTimeMs] [float initSpeed] takes control, starts drone, initializes PTAM. starts drone waits riseTimeMs, drone rise approx. height initializes PTAM flying (sending initSpeed control command) moveTimeMS, waiting waitTimeMS success (flying good default values "autoInit setInitialYaw [double yaw] sets yaw drone started ardrone absolute yaw control, yaw point due north. autoTakeover [int moveTimeMS] [int waitTimeMS] [int riseTimeMs] [float initSpeed] takes control, initializes PTAM. autoInit drone flying (skipps step). takeoff takes control, starts drone. reset map initialize PTAM setReference [doube [double [double [double yaw] sets reference point goto setMaxControl [double cap maximal control capped [cap], causing drone fly slower. setInitialReachDist [double dist drone close point initially setStayWithinDist [double dist drone stay close point amount time. setStayTime [double seconds time drone stay [stayWithinDist] target reached. clearCommands clears targets, command executed immediately. goto [doube [double [double [double yaw] flies position (x,y,z yaw), relative current reference point. blocks target reached set parameters moveBy [doube [double [double [double yaw] moves (x,y,z,yaw), relative current target position blocks target reached set parameters moveByRel [doube [double [double [double yaw] moves (x,y,z,yaw), relative current estimated position drone blocks target reached set parameters land initializes landing auto-land drone) lockScaleFP sets point change scale re-estimated current drone position. scaleFP set PTAM good, delayed PTAM initialized good. set useWorldFixpoint dynammic_reconfigure. drone_gui node offers simple GUI control drone_autopilot node, drone_stateestimation node fly drone manually keyboard joystick. #### Subscribed topics /cmd_vel /uga_tum_ardrone/com /ardrone/takeoff /ardrone/land /ardrone/reset /ardrone/predictedPose /ardrone/navdata /joy Published topics /cmd_vel /uga_tum_ardrone/com /ardrone/takeoff /ardrone/land /ardrone/reset Services calls /ardrone/togglecam calls /ardrone/flattrim IGNORE PARAMETER, significantly affects performance. KBsensRP: Sensitivity roll/pitch Keyboard control KBsensYaw: Sensitivity yaw Keyboard control KBsensGAZ: Sensitivity gaz Keyboard control #### Required transforms transforms Monitor Drone, Autopilot Stateestimation Nodes (top-right part). top-right, current publish-frequency important topics displayed: Drone Navdata: monitors /ardrone/navdata. connected drone, running correctly configured) ardrone_autonomy node. Drone Control: monitors /cmd_vel. frequency control commands published drone). Pose Estimates: monitors /ardrone/predictedPose. state predictions generated drone_stateestimation node. default, Joy Input: monitors /joy. connected game-pad running joy_node, Pings (RTT): current wireless LAN latency (RTT packages. high, reduce Wlan clutter. Manual joystick control drone. current control source set joystick autopilot allowed send control commands, set autopilot. Joystick control requires connected joystick running “rosrun joy joy_node”. sixaxis controller. controller work, small linux-hack required (set controller rights). left joystick horizontal pos. control; joystick height yaw control. release land. toggle emergency state. moving joysticks, Control Source immediately Joystick. safety (autopilot wired stuff immediately disabling autopilot enabeling manual control). control requires GUI window focus, upper-left text field. GUI active window press ESC immediately enable control set focus control works properly. safety (autopilot wired stuff press ESC immediately disabling autopilot enabeling manual control). fly i,j,k,l: fly horizontally. rotate yaw. toggle emergency takeoff land Buttons Land, Takeoff, ToggleCam, Emergency (toggles emergency state). Autopilot Control write commands top-left text field load eample files). simply add .txt files flightplans/. click Send transmit commands autopilot’s command queue (automatically sets Control Source Autopilot). click Clear clear autopilot command queue current target. click Reset reset Autopilot, PTAM EKF. Troubleshooting drone doesnt start: battery empty? (drone start battery Drone emergency state? led’s red. click Emergency reset). control drone: selected correct control source? re-select. drone flies unstable autopilot: adjust reduce control parameters dynamic_reconfigure readme_autopilot). drone broken: buy Bugs Issues software originally developed Ar.Drone pressure sensor magnetometer drone_stateestimation crashes occasionally PTAM init fails (crash occurs PTAM code). oarticular baseline keyframes, praxis. Tips Tricks Camera calibration front, drone: front, drone: calibrate ethzasl_ptam. work colored images, src/CameraCalibrator.cc change: add #include <cv_bridge/cv_bridge.h> change function imageCallback(…) void CameraCalibrator::imageCallback(const sensor_msgs::ImageConstPtr img) cv_bridge::CvImagePtr cv_ptr cv_bridge::toCvCopy(img, sensor_msgs::image_encodings::MONO8); if(mCurrentImage.size().x img->width mCurrentImage.size().y img->height) mCurrentImage.resize(CVD::ImageRef(img->width, img->height)); memcpy(mCurrentImage.data(),cv_ptr->image.data,img->width img->height); mNewImage true; Parameters: estimated easily recording flight: rosbag record calibFlight.bag /ardrone/image_raw /ardrone/navdata /cmd_vel playing flight: rosbag play calibFlight.bag starting stateestimation nodes, remapped output: rosrun uga_tum_ardrone drone_stateestimation __name:=drone_stateestimationn2 /ardrone/predictedPose:=/ardrone/predictedPose2 rosrun uga_tum_ardrone drone_stateestimation plotting respective estimated values rxplot /ardrone/predictedPose/dx,/ardrone/predictedPose2/dx dynamic reconfigure drone_stateestimation2, control gains drone_stateestimation, control gains, navdata speeds PTAM. setting drone_stateestimation2 graphs match (play Parameters: PID control approximate “simulation” based play record, stateestimation run (dont play /cmd_vel) rosbag play calibFlightZ.bag –topics /ardrone/image_raw /ardrone/navdata run stateestimation, dynamic reconfigure set control updates run gui autopilot, control plot control respective pose rxplot /ardrone/predictedPose/yaw /cmd_vel/angular/z Licence major part software package PTAM licensed GNU General Public License Version (GPLv3), http://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl.html. description: Visual odometry package, currently supporting stereo camera + IMU
maintainers: Fernando Caballero, Francisco J. Perez Grau
authors: Fernando Caballero, Francisco J. Perez Grau
readme: viodom ROS package (indigo) visual odometry. package single node: viodom_node, estimates robot motion based incoming raw images IMU mesaurements Visual-Inertial Sensor. correctly estimate motion, node wait seconds initialize IMU filter. depends OpenCV (installed ROS desktop-full) Eigen library installed system: sudo apt-get install libeigen3-dev talk Fernando Caballero (fcaballero@us.es), University Seville, Spain Francisco Perez Grau (fjperezgrau@gmail.com), CATEC (Center Advanced Aerospace Technologies), Spain Nodes package includes node takes stereo pair images IMU data, outputs pose estimates. Images rectified calibration information. startup, IMU filter initialized robot quiet seconds. parameters changed restart node, dynamic reconfiguration file subfolder ‘cfg’. Subscribed Topics left_cam/image_raw (sensor_msgs/Image): Left camera raw image. left_cam/camera_info (sensor_msgs/CameraInfo): Left camera calibration information. right_cam/image_raw (sensor_msgs/Image): camera raw image. right_cam/camera_info (sensor_msgs/CameraInfo): camera calibration information. imu_topic (sensor_msgs/Imu): IMU topic. Published Topics viodom_transform (geometry_msgs/TransformStamped): Robot’s estimated pose odom frame. point_cloud (sensor_msgs/PointCloud2): point cloud based input stereo pair. (tf/tfMessage): Publishes transform odom base_link. Demo package includes launch file parameters ready dataset recorded CATEC. dataset includes images, IMU data ground-truth localization VICON motion capture system. bagfile downloaded https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B3msAWZJELBTYXg3OE0zWmd0eVU Citing viodom academic context, cite publication: http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/7502653/ @INPROCEEDINGS{7502653, author={F. Perez-Grau Fabresse Caballero Viguria Ollero}, booktitle={2016 International Conference Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS)}, title={Long-term aerial robot localization based visual odometry radio-based ranging}, year={2016}, pages={608-614}, doi={10.1109/ICUAS.2016.7502653}, month={June},} presentation material https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B3msAWZJELBTbGJaUjBJOW11NTg

Dependencies software requires Ximea Linux Software Package. http://www.ximea.com/support/wiki/apis/XIMEA_Linux_Software_Package details. Basic Usage software ROS drivers ximea xiQ USB Cameras. driver supports image acquisition arbitrary number cameras, long sufficient bandwidth USB bus perform data transfer. order operate cameras, serial numbers devices create configuration file camera. configuration file /config folder. configuration file serial_no: cam_name: "camera1" yaml_url: "package://mcptam/calibrations/camera1.yaml" exposure_time: rect_left: rect_top: rect_height: rect_width: image_data_format: "XI_MONO8" serial_no refers serial number camera cam_name give camera yaml_url location calibration information file, camera info manager publish calibration parameters exposure_time refers image exposure time microseconds rect_left, rect_top, rect_height, rect_width set image region interest (ROI). Ximea xiQ API information (http://www.ximea.com/support/wiki/apis/XiAPI_Manual). image_data_format: sets data format image. formats XI_MONO16, XI_RGB24, XI_RGB32, XI_RAW8, XI_RAW16, XI_MONO8 supported Create launch file camera configuration. typical launch file <launch> Camera Node <node name="ximea" pkg="ximea_camera" type="ximea_camera_node" output="screen" <param name="frame_rate" type="int" <rosparam param="camera_param_file_paths" subst_value="true">[$(find ximea_camera)/config/ximea1.yaml, $(find ximea_camera)/config/ximea2.yaml]</rosparam> </node> </launch> main parameters interest frame rate file paths. frame_rate corresponds frame rate cameras group. camera_param_file_paths list file names configuration files camera step single camera setup, camera_param_file_paths parameter <rosparam param="camera_param_file_paths" subst_value="true">[$(find ximea_camera)/config/ximea1.yaml]</rosparam> camera setup list file names configuration files cameras, separated commas: <rosparam param="camera_param_file_paths" subst_value="true">[$(find ximea_camera)/config/ximea1.yaml, $(find ximea_camera)/config/ximea2.yaml, $(find ximea_camera)/config/ximea3.yaml]</rosparam> able plug cameras launch file created step Published Topics set published topics namespace camera camera publish: /camera_info, ROS message type sensor_msgs/CameraInfo. message carries camera specific calibration information. /image_raw/, ROS message type sensor_msgs/Image. message carries image data.
